mapper.select: SELECT ID, QUIZ_CHOICE_NUMBER, QUIZ_CHOICE_IS_CORRECT, QUIZ_CHOICE_DETAIL, QUIZ_QUESTION_ID FROM TBL_QUIZ_CHOICE WHERE QUIZ_QUESTION_ID = #{quizQuestionId} ORDER BY QUIZ_CHOICE_NUMBER ASC
SELECT ID, QUIZ_CHOICE_NUMBER, QUIZ_CHOICE_IS_CORRECT, QUIZ_CHOICE_DETAIL, QUIZ_QUESTION_ID FROM TBL_QUIZ_CHOICE WHERE QUIZ_QUESTION_ID = #{quizQuestionId} AND QUIZ_CHOICE_IS_CORRECT = 1
